---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What limitation are you hitting?

Example: *"The bot doesn't account for funding rates, so it holds positions through negative funding periods and loses money."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches you've thought about?

## Impact

How would this improve DeepAlpha?

- [ ] Better prediction accuracy
- [ ] Lower execution costs
- [ ] Better risk management
- [ ] New exchange / market support
- [ ] Developer experience / tooling
- [ ] Documentation / onboarding

## Implementation Ideas

If you have thoughts on how to implement this, share them here. Code snippets, references to papers, or links to similar implementations are all helpful.

```python
# Optional: rough pseudocode or API sketch
```

## Would You Work on This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I can help test but not implement
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional Context

Any links, screenshots, papers, or examples that help explain the request.

> **Note:** Many advanced features are already available in [DeepAlpha Pro](https://stefanocrypto.gumroad.com/l/ezilv) including XGBoost ensemble, 50 features, PPO reinforcement learning, ATR trailing stops, and Grafana dashboard. Check if your request is already covered before submitting.
